name: Babban darajar AVPU
description: Ƙimar sanin matakin 4 mai sauri. Ya fi GCS sauri don daidaitawa na farko.
instructions: Yi la'akari da matakin mafi girma na amsa mai haƙuri ya nuna.

scoring.label: Fadakarwa
scoring.description: Mara lafiya a farke, sane, kuma yana amsawa kullum

scoring.label: Murya
scoring.description: Mara lafiya yana amsawa ne kawai don ƙarfafawa ta baki

scoring.label: Ciwo
scoring.description: Mara lafiya yana amsawa kawai ga abubuwan motsa jiki masu raɗaɗi (sternal rub, matsi na ƙusa)

scoring.label: Rashin amsawa
scoring.description: Babu amsa ga duk wani kuzari -- ana buƙatar shiga tsakani na iska nan da nan

interpretation.triage: Mahimmanci - hanyar iska a cikin haɗari, GCS yawanci <= 8
Nan take -- sarrafa hanyar iska a yanzu
